description_long: This jewelry store features a prominent bay window facade with large, multi-pane glass windows framed in black, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the interior. The exterior walls are clad in a light-colored, textured brick pattern, giving the building a classic and inviting appearance. The entrance is centrally located beneath a green awning with signage, flanked by the bay windows. The rear section of the building is characterized by a large glass-roofed extension, likely serving as a showroom or display area, with visible tables and seating inside. The interior includes display counters and shelving, with a mix of green and white wall treatments and decorative elements. The overall design blends traditional storefront charm with modern glass elements, making it a visually appealing destination in an urban setting.
description: A classic jewelry store with a brick facade, large bay windows, a green awning, and a modern glass-roofed showroom extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bay windows, central entrance with green awning, and detailed brickwork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, partial view of the interior, and the full length of the glass-roofed extension.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the glass-roofed showroom, interior tables, and the back brick wall with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uninterrupted brick wall, interior decor, and the side of the glass extension.
attribute_storefront_signage: A green rectangular awning above the entrance with white text reading 'jewelry bar', centered between the bay windows.
